text: diverey qohelet ben-david melekh birushalaim
havel havalim amar qohelet havel havalim hakol havel
mah-yiterovn laadam bekhal-'amalov sheya'amol tachat hashamesh
dovr holekh vedovr ba vehaarets le'ovlam 'omadet
vezarach hashemesh uva hashamesh veel-meqovmov shovef zovrecha hu sham
hovlekh el-darovm vesovvev el-tsafovn sovvev ׀ sovev hovlekh harucha ve'al-sevivotayv shav harucha
kal-hanechalim holekhim el-hayam vehayam eynenu male el-meqovm shehanechalim holekhim sham hem shavim lalakhet
kal-hadevarim yege'im lo-yukhal ish ledaber lo-tiseba' 'ayin lireovt velo-timale ozen mishemo'a
mah-shehaya hu sheyiheye umah-shena'asa hu sheye'ase veeyn kal-chadash tachat hashamesh
yesh davar sheyomar reeh-ze chadash hu kevar haya le'olamim asher haya milefanenu
eyn zikherovn larishonim vegam laacharonim sheyiheyu lo-yiheye lahem zikarovn 'im sheyiheyu laacharona f
ani qohelet hayiti melekh 'al-yiserael birushalaim
venatati et-libi liderovsh velatur bachakhema 'al kal-asher na'asa tachat hashamayim hu ׀ 'ineyan ra' natan elohim liveney haadam la'anovt bov
raiti et-kal-hama'asim shena'asu tachat hashamesh vehine hakol hevel ure'ut rucha
me'uvat lo-yukhal liteqon vecheserovn lo-yukhal lehimanovt
dibareti ani 'im-libi lemor ani hine higedaleti vehovsafeti chakhema 'al kal-asher-haya lefanay 'al-yerushalaim velibi raa harebe chakhema vada'at
vaetena libi lada'at chakhema veda'at hovlelovt vesikhelut yada'eti shegam-ze hu ra'eyovn rucha
ki berov chakhema rav-ka'as veyovsif da'at yovsif makheovv
amareti ani belibi lekhah-na anasekha vesimecha uree vetovv vehine gam-hu havel
lisechovq amareti mehovlal ulesimecha mah-zo 'osa
tareti velibi limeshovkh bayayin et-besari velibi noheg bachakhema veleechoz besikhelut 'ad asher-eree ey-ze tovv liveney haadam asher ya'asu tachat hashamayim misepar yemey chayeyhem
higedaleti ma'asay baniti li batim nata'eti li keramim
'asiti li ganovt ufaredesim venata'eti vahem 'ets kal-peri
'asiti li berekhovt mayim lehasheqovt mehem ya'ar tsovmecha 'etsim
qaniti 'avadim ushefachovt uveney-vayit haya li gam miqene vaqar vatson harebe haya li mikol shehayu lefanay birushalaim
kanaseti li gam-kesef vezahav usegulat melakhim vehamedinovt 'asiti li sharim vesharovt veta'anugot beney haadam shida veshidovt
vegadaleti vehovsafeti mikol shehaya lefanay birushalaim af chakhemati 'ameda li
vekhol asher shaalu 'eynay lo atsaleti mehem lo-mana'eti et-libi mikal-simecha ki-libi samecha mikal-'amali vezeh-haya cheleqi mikal-'amali
ufaniti ani bekhal-ma'asay she'asu yaday uve'amal she'amaleti la'asovt vehine hakol hevel ure'ut rucha veeyn yiterovn tachat hashamesh
ufaniti ani lireovt chakhema vehovlelovt vesikhelut ki ׀ me haadam sheyavov acharey hamelekh et asher-kevar 'asuhu
veraiti ani sheyesh yiterovn lachakhema min-hasikhelut kiterovn haovr min-hachoshekh
hechakham 'eynayv beroshov vehakesil bachoshekh hovlekh veyada'eti gam-ani shemiqere echad yiqere et-kulam
veamareti ani belibi kemiqere hakesil gam-ani yiqereni velama chakhameti ani az yovter vedibareti velibi shegam-ze havel
ki eyn zikherovn lechakham 'im-hakesil le'ovlam beshekevar hayamim habaim hakol nishekach veeykh yamut hechakham 'im-hakesil
vesaneti et-hachayim ki ra' 'alay hama'ase shena'asa tachat hashamesh ki-hakol hevel ure'ut rucha
vesaneti ani et-kal-'amali sheani 'amel tachat hashamesh sheanichenu laadam sheyiheye acharay
umi yovde'a hechakham yiheye ov sakhal veyishelat bekhal-'amali she'amaleti veshechakhameti tachat hashamesh gam-ze havel
vesabovti ani leyaesh et-libi 'al kal-he'amal she'amaleti tachat hashamesh
ki-yesh adam she'amalov bechakhema uveda'at uvekhisherovn uleadam shelo 'amal-bov yitenenu cheleqov gam-ze hevel vera'a raba
ki meh-hove laadam bekhal-'amalov uvera'eyovn libov shehu 'amel tachat hashamesh
ki khal-yamayv makheovim vakha'as 'ineyanov gam-balayela lo-shakhav libov gam-ze hevel hu
eyn-tovv baadam sheyokhal veshata veherea et-nafeshov tovv ba'amalov gam-zo raiti ani ki miyad haelohim hi
ki mi yokhal umi yachush chuts mimeni
ki leadam shetovv lefanayv natan chakhema veda'at vesimecha velachovte natan 'ineyan leesovf velikhenovs latet letovv lifeney haelohim gam-ze hevel ure'ut rucha
lakol zeman ve'et lekhal-chefets tachat hashamayim s
'et laledet ve'et lamut 'et lata'at ve'et la'aqovr natu'a
'et laharovg ve'et lirepov 'et liferovts ve'et livenovt
'et livekovt ve'et lisechovq 'et sefovd ve'et reqovd
'et lehashelikh avanim ve'et kenovs avanim 'et lachavovq ve'et lirechoq mechabeq
'et levaqesh ve'et leabed 'et lishemovr ve'et lehashelikh
'et liqerov'a ve'et litepovr 'et lachashovt ve'et ledaber
'et leehov ve'et liseno 'et milechama ve'et shalovm s
mah-yiterovn ha'ovse baasher hu 'amel
raiti et-ha'ineyan asher natan elohim liveney haadam la'anovt bov
et-hakol 'asa yafe ve'itov gam et-ha'olam natan belibam mibeli asher lo-yimetsa haadam et-hama'ase asher-'asa haelohim merosh ve'ad-sovf
yada'eti ki eyn tovv bam ki im-lisemovcha vela'asovt tovv bechayayv
vegam kal-haadam sheyokhal veshata veraa tovv bekhal-'amalov matat elohim hi
yada'eti ki kal-asher ya'ase haelohim hu yiheye le'ovlam 'alayv eyn lehovsif umimenu eyn ligero'a vehaelohim 'asa sheyireu milefanayv
mah-shehaya kevar hu vaasher liheyovt kevar haya vehaelohim yevaqesh et-niredaf
ve'ovd raiti tachat hashamesh meqovm hamishepat shama haresha' umeqovm hatsedeq shama harasha'
amareti ani belibi et-hatsadiq veet-harasha' yishepot haelohim ki-'et lekhal-chefets ve'al kal-hama'ase sham
amareti ani belibi 'al-diverat beney haadam levaram haelohim velireovt shehem-behema hema lahem
ki miqere veney-haadam umiqere habehema umiqere echad lahem kemovt ze ken movt ze verucha echad lakol umovtar haadam min-habehema ayin ki hakol havel
hakol hovlekh el-maqovm echad hakol haya min-he'afar vehakol shav el-he'afar
mi yovde'a rucha beney haadam ha'ola hi lema'ela verucha habehema hayoredet hi lemata laarets
veraiti ki eyn tovv measher yisemach haadam bema'asayv ki-hu cheleqov ki mi yevienu lireovt beme sheyiheye acharayv
veshaveti ani vaeree et-kal-ha'ashuqim asher na'asim tachat hashamesh vehine ׀ dime'at ha'ashuqim veeyn lahem menachem umiyad 'osheqeyhem kocha veeyn lahem menachem
veshabecha ani et-hametim shekevar metu min-hachayim asher hema chayim 'adena
vetovv misheneyhem et asher-'aden lo haya asher lo-raa et-hama'ase hara' asher na'asa tachat hashamesh
veraiti ani et-kal-'amal veet kal-kisherovn hama'ase ki hi qineat-ish mere'ehu gam-ze hevel ure'ut rucha
hakesil choveq et-yadayv veokhel et-besarov
tovv melo khaf nachat mimelo chafenayim 'amal ure'ut rucha
veshaveti ani vaeree hevel tachat hashamesh
yesh echad veeyn sheni gam ben vaach eyn-lov veeyn qets lekhal-'amalov gam 'eynayv kh 'eynov q lo-tiseba' 'osher ulemi ׀ ani 'amel umechaser et-nafeshi mitovva gam-ze hevel ve'ineyan ra' hu
tovvim hashenayim min-haechad asher yesh-lahem sakhar tovv ba'amalam
ki im-yipolu haechad yaqim et-chaverov veilov haechad sheyipovl veeyn sheni lahaqimov
gam im-yishekevu shenayim vecham lahem uleechad eykh yecham
veim-yiteqefov haechad hashenayim ya'amedu negedov vehachut hameshulash lo vimehera yinateq
tovv yeled miseken vechakham mimelekh zaqen ukhesil asher lo-yada' lehizaher 'ovd
ki-mibeyt hasurim yatsa limelokh ki gam bemalekhutov novlad rash
raiti et-kal-hachayim hamehalekhim tachat hashamesh 'im hayeled hasheni asher ya'amod tachetayv
eyn-qets lekhal-ha'am lekhol asher-haya lifeneyhem gam haacharovnim lo yisemechu-vov ki-gam-ze hevel vera'eyovn rucha
shemor rageleykha kh ragelekha q kaasher telekh el-beyt haelohim veqarovv lishemo'a mitet hakesilim zavach ki-eynam yovde'im la'asovt ra'
al-tevahel 'al-pikha velibekha al-yemaher lehovtsi davar lifeney haelohim ki haelohim bashamayim veata 'al-haarets 'al-ken yiheyu devareykha me'atim
ki ba hachalovm berov 'ineyan veqovl kesil berov devarim
kaasher tidor neder lelohim al-teacher leshalemov ki eyn chefets bakesilim et asher-tidor shalem
tovv asher lo-tidor mishetidovr velo teshalem
al-titen et-pikha lachati et-besarekha veal-tomar lifeney hamaleakh ki shegaga hi lama yiqetsof haelohim 'al-qovlekha vechibel et-ma'ase yadeykha
ki verov chalomovt vahavalim udevarim harebe ki et-haelohim yera
im-'osheq rash vegezel mishepat vatsedeq tiree vamedina al-titemah 'al-hachefets ki gavoha me'al gavoha shomer ugevohim 'aleyhem
veyiterovn erets bakol hi kh hu q melekh lesade ne'evad
ohev kesef lo-yiseba' kesef umi-ohev behamovn lo tevua gam-ze havel
birevovt hatovva rabu ovkheleyha umah-kisherovn live'aleyha ki im reiyat kh reut q 'eynayv
metuqa shenat ha'oved im-me'at veim-harebe yokhel vehasava' le'ashir eynenu manicha lov lishovn
yesh ra'a chovla raiti tachat hashamesh 'osher shamur live'alayv lera'atov
veavad ha'osher hahu be'ineyan ra' vehovlid ben veeyn beyadov meuma
kaasher yatsa mibeten imov 'arovm yashuv lalekhet kesheba umeuma lo-yisa va'amalov sheyolekh beyadov
vegam-zo ra'a chovla kal-'umat sheba ken yelekh umah-yiterovn lov sheya'amol larucha
gam kal-yamayv bachoshekh yokhel vekha'as harebe vechaleyov vaqatsef
hine asher-raiti ani tovv asher-yafe leekhovl-velishetovt velireovt tovva bekhal-'amalov ׀ sheya'amol tachat-hashemesh misepar yemey chayav kh chayayv q asher-natan-lov haelohim ki-hu cheleqov
gam kal-haadam asher natan-lov haelohim 'osher unekhasim vehishelitov leekhol mimenu velaset et-cheleqov velisemocha ba'amalov zo matat elohim hi
ki lo harebe yizekor et-yemey chayayv ki haelohim ma'ane besimechat libov
yesh ra'a asher raiti tachat hashamesh veraba hi 'al-haadam
ish asher yiten-lov haelohim 'osher unekhasim vekhavovd veeynenu chaser lenafeshov ׀ mikol asher-yiteave velo-yashelitenu haelohim leekhol mimenu ki ish nakheri yokhalenu ze hevel vacholi ra' hu
im-yovlid ish mea veshanim rabovt yicheye verav ׀ sheyiheyu yemey-shanayv venafeshov lo-tiseba' min-hatovva vegam-qevura lo-hayeta lov amareti tovv mimenu hanafel
ki-vahevel ba uvachoshekh yelekh uvachoshekh shemov yekhuse
gam-shemesh lo-raa velo yada' nachat laze mize
veilu chaya elef shanim pa'amayim vetovva lo raa halo el-maqovm echad hakol hovlekh
kal-'amal haadam lefihu vegam-hanefesh lo timale
ki mah-yovter lechakham min-hakesil mah-le'ani yovde'a lahalokh neged hachayim
tovv maree 'eynayim mehalakhe-nafesh gam-ze hevel ure'ut rucha
mah-shehaya kevar niqera shemov venovda' asher-hu adam velo-yukhal ladin 'im shehateqif kh shetaqif q mimenu
ki yesh-devarim harebe marebim havel mah-yoter laadam
ki mi-yovde'a mah-tovv laadam bachayim misepar yemey-chayey hevelov veya'asem katsel asher mi-yagid laadam mah-yiheye acharayv tachat hashamesh
tovv shem mishemen tovv veyovm hamavet miyovm hivaledov
tovv lalekhet el-beyt-evel milekhet el-beyt mishete baasher hu sovf kal-haadam vehachay yiten el-libov
tovv ka'as misechoq ki-vero'a panim yitav lev
lev chakhamim beveyt evel velev kesilim beveyt simecha
tovv lishemo'a ga'arat chakham meish shome'a shir kesilim
ki kheqovl hasirim tachat hasir ken sechoq hakesil vegam-ze havel
ki ha'osheq yehovlel chakham viabed et-lev matana
tovv acharit davar mereshitov tovv erekhe-rucha migevah-rucha
al-tevahel beruchakha likhe'ovs ki kha'as becheyq kesilim yanucha
al-tomar me haya shehayamim harishonim hayu tovvim meele ki lo mechakhema shaaleta 'al-ze
tovva chakhema 'im-nachala veyoter leroey hashamesh
ki betsel hachakhema betsel hakasef veyiterovn da'at hachakhema techaye ve'aleyha
ree et-ma'ase haelohim ki mi yukhal letaqen et asher 'ivetov
beyovm tovva heye vetovv uveyovm ra'a ree gam et-ze le'umat-ze 'asa haelohim 'al-diverat shelo yimetsa haadam acharayv meuma
et-hakol raiti bimey heveli yesh tsadiq oved betsideqov veyesh rasha' maarikh bera'atov
al-tehi tsadiq harebe veal-titechakam yovter lama tishovmem
al-tiresha' harebe veal-tehi sakhal lama tamut belo 'itekha
tovv asher teechoz baze vegam-mize al-tanach et-yadekha ki-yere elohim yetse et-kulam
hachakhema ta'oz lechakham me'asara shalitim asher hayu ba'ir
ki adam eyn tsadiq baarets asher ya'aseh-tovv velo yecheta
gam lekhal-hadevarim asher yedaberu al-titen libekha asher lo-tishema' et-'avedekha meqalelekha
ki gam-pe'amim rabovt yada' libekha asher gam at kh ata q qilaleta acherim
kal-zo nisiti vachakhema amareti echekama vehi rechovqa mimeni
rachovq mah-shehaya ve'amoq ׀ 'amoq mi yimetsaenu
sabovti ani velibi lada'at velatur uvaqesh chakhema vecheshebovn velada'at resha' kesel vehasikhelut hovlelovt
umovtse ani mar mimavet et-haisha asher-hi metsovdim vacharamim libah asurim yadeyha tovv lifeney haelohim yimalet mimena vechovte yilakhed bah
ree ze matsati amera qohelet achat leachat limetso cheshebovn
asher 'ovd-biqesha nafeshi velo matsati adam echad meelef matsati veisha vekhal-ele lo matsati
levad reeh-ze matsati asher 'asa haelohim et-haadam yashar vehema viqeshu chishevonovt rabim
mi kehechakham umi yovde'a pesher davar chakhemat adam tair panayv ve'oz panayv yeshune
ani pi-melekh shemovr ve'al diverat shevu'at elohim
al-tibahel mipanayv telekh al-ta'amod bedavar ra' ki kal-asher yachepots ya'ase
baasher devar-melekh shiletovn umi yomar-lov mah-ta'ase
shovmer mitseva lo yeda' davar ra' ve'et umishepat yeda' lev chakham
ki lekhal-chefets yesh 'et umishepat ki-ra'at haadam raba 'alayv
ki-eynenu yode'a mah-sheyiheye ki kaasher yiheye mi yagid lov
eyn adam shalit barucha likhelov et-harucha veeyn shiletovn beyovm hamavet veeyn mishelachat bamilechama velo-yemalet resha' et-be'alayv
et-kal-ze raiti venatovn et-libi lekhal-ma'ase asher na'asa tachat hashamesh 'et asher shalat haadam beadam lera' lov
uvekhen raiti resha'im qevurim vavau umimeqovm qadovsh yehalekhu veyishetakechu va'ir asher ken-'asu gam-ze havel
asher eyn-na'asa fitegam ma'ase hara'a mehera 'al-ken male lev beney-haadam bahem la'asovt ra'
asher chote 'ose ra' meat umaarikh lov ki gam-yovde'a ani asher yiheyeh-tovv leyireey haelohim asher yireu milefanayv
vetovv lo-yiheye larasha' velo-yaarikh yamim katsel asher eynenu yare milifeney elohim
yesh-hevel asher na'asa 'al-haarets asher ׀ yesh tsadiqim asher magi'a alehem kema'ase haresha'im veyesh resha'im shemagi'a alehem kema'ase hatsadiqim amareti shegam-ze havel
veshibacheti ani et-hasimecha asher eyn-tovv laadam tachat hashemesh ki im-leekhovl velishetovt velisemovcha vehu yilevenu va'amalov yemey chayayv asher-natan-lov haelohim tachat hashamesh
kaasher natati et-libi lada'at chakhema velireovt et-ha'ineyan asher na'asa 'al-haarets ki gam bayovm uvalayela shena be'eynayv eynenu roe

veraiti et-kal-ma'ase haelohim ki lo yukhal haadam limetsov et-hama'ase asher na'asa tachat-hashemesh beshel asher ya'amol haadam levaqesh velo yimetsa vegam im-yomar hechakham lada'at lo yukhal limetso
ki et-kal-ze natati el-libi velavur et-kal-ze asher hatsadiqim vehachakhamim va'avadeyhem beyad haelohim gam-ahava gam-sinea eyn yovde'a haadam hakol lifeneyhem
hakol kaasher lakol miqere echad latsadiq velarasha' latovv velatahovr velatame velazovecha velaasher eynenu zovecha katovv kachote hanisheba' kaasher shevu'a yare
ze ׀ ra' bekhol asher-na'asa tachat hashemesh ki-miqere echad lakol vegam lev beney-haadam male-ra' vehovlelovt bilevavam bechayeyhem veacharayv el-hametim
ki-mi asher yibacher kh yechubar q el kal-hachayim yesh bitachovn ki-lekhelev chay hu tovv min-haareye hamet
ki hachayim yovde'im sheyamutu vehametim eynam yovde'im meuma veeyn-'ovd lahem sakhar ki nishekach zikheram
gam ahavatam gam-sineatam gam-qineatam kevar avada vecheleq eyn-lahem 'ovd le'ovlam bekhol asher-na'asa tachat hashamesh
lekh ekhol besimecha lachemekha ushate velev-tovv yeynekha ki khevar ratsa haelohim et-ma'aseykha
bekhal-'et yiheyu vegadeykha levanim veshemen 'al-roshekha al-yechesar
ree chayim 'im-isha asher-ahaveta kal-yemey chayey hevelekha asher natan-lekha tachat hashemesh kol yemey hevelekha ki hu cheleqekha bachayim uva'amalekha asher-ata 'amel tachat hashamesh
kol asher timetsa yadekha la'asovt bekhochakha 'ase ki eyn ma'ase vecheshebovn veda'at vechakhema bisheovl asher ata holekh shama s
shaveti verao tachat-hashemesh ki lo laqalim hamerovts velo lagibovrim hamilechama vegam lo lachakhamim lechem vegam lo lanevonim 'osher vegam lo layode'im chen ki-'et vafega' yiqere et-kulam
ki gam lo-yeda' haadam et-'itov kadagim sheneechazim bimetsovda ra'a vekhatsiporim haachuzovt bapach kahem yuqashim beney haadam le'et ra'a keshetipovl 'aleyhem piteom
gam-zo raiti chakhema tachat hashamesh ugedovla hi elay
'ir qetana vaanashim bah me'at uva-eleyha melekh gadovl vesavav otah uvana 'aleyha metsovdim gedolim
umatsa vah ish miseken chakham umilat-hu et-ha'ir bechakhematov veadam lo zakhar et-haish hamiseken hahu
veamareti ani tovva chakhema migevura vechakhemat hamiseken bezuya udevarayv eynam nishema'im
diverey chakhamim benachat nishema'im miza'aqat movshel bakesilim
tovva chakhema mikeley qerav vechovte echad yeabed tovva harebe
zevuvey mavet yaveish yabi'a shemen rovqecha yaqar mechakhema mikavovd sikhelut me'at
lev chakham liminov velev kesil lisemolov
vegam-baderekh keshehasakhal kh keshesakhal q holekh libov chaser veamar lakol sakhal hu
im-rucha hamovshel ta'ale 'aleykha meqovmekha al-tanach ki marepe yanicha chataim gedovlim
yesh ra'a raiti tachat hashamesh kishegaga sheyotsa milifeney hashalit
nitan hasekhel bamerovmim rabim va'ashirim bashefel yeshevu
raiti 'avadim 'al-susim vesarim holekhim ka'avadim 'al-haarets
chofer gumats bov yipovl uforets gader yishekhenu nachash
masi'a avanim ye'atsev bahem bovqe'a 'etsim yisakhen bam
im-qeha habarezel vehu lo-fanim qileqal vachayalim yegaber veyiterovn hakhesheyr chakhema
im-yishokh hanachash belov-lachash veeyn yiterovn leva'al halashovn
diverey fi-chakham chen vesifetovt kesil tevale'enu
techilat diverey-fihu sikhelut veacharit pihu hovlelut ra'a
vehasakhal yarebe devarim lo-yeda' haadam mah-sheyiheye vaasher yiheye meacharayv mi yagid lov
'amal hakesilim teyage'enu asher lo-yada' lalekhet el-'ir
i-lakh erets shemalekekh na'ar vesarayikh baboqer yokhelu
ashereykh erets shemalekekh ben-chovrim vesarayikh ba'et yokhelu bigevura velo vasheti
ba'atsaletayim yimakh hameqare uveshifelut yadayim yidelof habayit
lisechovq 'osim lechem veyayin yesamach chayim vehakesef ya'ane et-hakol
gam bemada'akha melekh al-teqalel uvechaderey mishekavekha al-teqalel 'ashir ki 'ovf hashamayim yovlikh et-haqovl uva'al hakenafayim kh kenafayim q yageyd davar
shalach lachemekha 'al-peney hamayim ki-verov hayamim timetsaenu
ten-cheleq leshive'a vegam lishemovna ki lo teda' mah-yiheye ra'a 'al-haarets
im-yimaleu he'avim geshem 'al-haarets yariqu veim-yipovl 'ets badarovm veim batsafovn meqovm sheyipovl ha'ets sham yehu
shomer rucha lo yizera' veroe ve'avim lo yiqetsovr
kaasher eynekha yovde'a mah-derekh harucha ka'atsamim beveten hamelea kakha lo teda' et-ma'ase haelohim asher ya'ase et-hakol
baboqer zera' et-zare'ekha vela'erev al-tanach yadekha ki eynekha yovde' ey ze yikheshar haze ov-ze veim-sheneyhem keechad tovvim
umatovq haovr vetovv la'eynayim lireovt et-hashamesh
ki im-shanim harebe yicheye haadam bekhulam yisemach veyizekor et-yemey hachoshekh ki-harebe yiheyu kal-sheba havel
semach bachur beyaleduteykha vitivekha libekha bimey vechurovtekha vehalekh bedarekhey libekha uvemareey 'eyneykha veda' ki 'al-kal-ele yeviakha haelohim bamishepat
vehaser ka'as milibekha veha'aver ra'a mibesarekha ki-hayaledut vehashacharut havel
uzekhor et-bovreeykha bimey bechuroteykha 'ad asher lo-yavou yemey hara'a vehigi'u shanim asher tomar eyn-li vahem chefets
'ad asher lo-techeshakh hashemesh vehaovr vehayarecha vehakovkhavim veshavu he'avim achar hagashem
bayovm sheyazu'u shomerey habayit vehite'avetu aneshey hechayil uvatelu hatochanovt ki mi'etu vechashekhu haroovt baarubovt
vesugeru delatayim bashuq bishefal qovl hatachana veyaqum leqovl hatsipovr veyishachu kal-benovt hashir
gam migavoha yirau vechatechatim baderekh veyanets hashaqed veyisetabel hechagav vetafer haaviyovna ki-holekh haadam el-beyt 'ovlamov vesavevu vashuq hasofedim
'ad asher lo yirchaq kh yerateq q chevel hakesef vetaruts gulat hazahav vetishaver kad 'al-hamabu'a venarots hagalegal el-habovr
veyashov he'afar 'al-haarets keshehaya veharucha tashuv el-haelohim asher netanah
havel havalim amar haqovhelet hakol havel
veyoter shehaya qohelet chakham 'ovd limad-da'at et-ha'am veizen vechiqer tiqen meshalim harebe
biqesh qohelet limetso diverey-chefets vekhatuv yosher diverey emet
diverey chakhamim kadarevonovt ukhemasemerovt netu'im ba'aley asupovt nitenu mero'e echad
veyoter mehema beni hizaher 'asovt sefarim harebe eyn qets velahag harebe yegi'at basar
sovf davar hakol nishema' et-haelohim yera veet-mitseotayv shemovr ki-ze kal-haadam
ki et-kal-ma'ase haelohim yavi vemishepat 'al kal-ne'elam im-tovv veim-ra'
